content.text:
1. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full tweet: "just shipped the biggest update for aeon ever i've been using aeon for the past month; at the beginning, it was just a better version of openclaw running in the cloud then one week ago, i've started giving aeon more autonomy. it started to ship a self-healing loop for his skills. then it started to ship a skill that auto-merge repos. then it built a fleet automation system. for the past few days, my aeon has honestly became 3x more useful & efficient - all of this autonomously. so it just clicked. i'm not building an openclaw competitor to get a hacker news digest on slack. i'm building the most autonomous agent framework, which can self-replicate, create new instances, create new skills & merge them autonomously."[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044468855452418257)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044445713212289202)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: Likes=76, Reposts=12, Replies=8  
   Direct link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044468855452418257

2. **@MrDegenWolf**  
   Full tweet: "my current ai agents bag potential, gud dev, gud product higher." (with image of bag including $aeon)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451059930665180)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-14  
   Engagement: Likes=54, Reposts=2, Replies=24  
   Direct link: https://x.com/MrDegenWolf/status/2044194156734546298

3. **@aeonframework**  
   Full tweet: "aeon is the most autonomous agent framework. No approval loops. No babysitting. Configure once, forget forever." (with image)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044466905407266867)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: Likes=29, Reposts=8, Replies=2  
   Direct link: https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2044466905407266867

   Full tweet: "if you've shared / shilled $aeon / $miroshark in the past few days make sure you've linked your X account to your @bankrbot account enabling a new skill (experimental) for @aeonframework tomorrow" (with image)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044445713212289202)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: Likes=41, Reposts=5, Quotes=7, Replies=13

6. **@0xDaes**  
   Full tweet: "Not gonna write a whole essay but $AEON by @aaronjmars is one of those things that just works and people are actually using it before CT even notices. It runs on GitHub Actions, you fork it and it just does stuff for you on a schedule, research digests PR reviews token alerts whatever you want + way cheaper to run than openclaw."[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2043777375356256568)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-13  
   Engagement: Likes=16, Reposts=3, Replies=5  
   Direct link: https://x.com/0xDaes/status/2043777375356256568
